bio: Since 1996: The DIVERSE Spectrum of the Left...The video form of Verdant Square Network's #DiverseSpectrumOfTheLeft: News & news/talk, arts, culture, our KYNDMIX music discovery, humor, faith, outrage, altruism, green living, food, resistance, activism, all facts & opinions, and so, so much wokeism.  From longtime Pacifica affiliate Verdant Square Radio, from Grateful Dread Peace Media. Raising funding to return to the air/netwaves. To help: https://cutt.ly/pr6A2Rw #vsn

Industrious slacker. Love spending time in my workshop and getting outdoors with my wife and our dogs. Have been known to brew beer and mix cocktails.You can also find me at Counterwave (https://www.counterwave.com), where we make puzzles like OMBY — The Moby-Dick Unscrambling Game (https://www.counterwavegames.com/omby).Previously at Sun, Apple, Verisign, HP, and several startups in between, working on distributed and federated systems.
Writer turned investor turned investor who writes.
Crynet.io (project manager), ICO/IDO/IEO, venture & marketing projects, NGO & investment projects
Passionate about disability rights. Author of Nosie Adventures children's books that teach difference is OK. www.LindaDezenski.com
Photographer / Writer / Dad / DenveriteInterested in using #FOSS for graphics and finding a new approach to marketing that rejects surveillance capitalism.
Plays Startup Head of Product & Design. Toots about tech, design and product management. 🖖Listen with empathy. Decide with urgency. Execute with intelligence.
Stone Mover, Technologist and Researcher, Economist, Maker of things, Lover of Adventures. Heart Centered Agent of Change.

Software Engineer at a medium-sized finance company. Previously Big Tech and a fintech startup. Heavy user of HN. Fan of functional programming. Fan of maintainable and readable code in all languages. Fan of electric vehicles. Bigger fan of bicycles.

💻 Community Manager and Contributor at MacStorieshttps://MacStories.net👉 Join Club MacStorieshttps://plus.club🎙️ Host of the First, Last, Everything podcasthttps://www.macstories.net/first-last-everything🎨 Freelance pixel pushing artworker.Portfolio: https://jonathanreed.me/Former baby📍 London
